items.title: Towards Responsibly Non-Compliant Machines
items.tldr: We consider the problem of engineering autonomous intelligent agents that are capable to responsibly not comply with user requests. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: nD-RoPE: A Generalized RoPE for n-Dimensional Position Embedding
items.tldr: Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE) is widely adopted in Transformer models, yet its extension to high-dimensional domains lacks a unified theoretical formulation. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: PCA-Enhanced Adaptive NVAR Framework for High-Resolution Sea Surface Temperature Forecasting in the East Sea
items.tldr: Accurate forecasting of sea surface temperature (SST) in regional seas such as the East Sea is crucial for monitoring marine ecosystems, assessing climate risks, managing fisheries, and conducting naval operations. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: Unstable Features, Reproducible Subspaces: Understanding Seed Dependence in Sparse Autoencoders
items.tldr: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) are widely used to interpret neural network representations, but their utility depends on whether the learned features are reproducible across training runs. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: A Lightweight Multi-Agent Framework for Automated Concrete Barrier Design
items.tldr: The design of reinforced concrete highway barriers is a safety-critical process that requires strict compliance with regulatory provisions such as the AASHTO-LRFD bridge design guidelines. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: Proximity-induced unconventional superconductivity and chiral topological phases in twisted graphene/NbSe$_2$ van der Waals heterostructure
items.tldr: We study proximity-induced unconventional superconductivity in a twisted graphene/NbSe$_2$ van der Waals heterostructure using the Bogoliubov-de Gennes formalism. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: Quantum ergodicity and semiclassical measures: mathematical results
items.tldr: In this chapter we review some results describing the high-frequency eigenmodes of the Laplacian on compact manifolds, or Euclidean domains, for which the geodesic flow is chaotic. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: Necessary and Sufficient Conditions for Universal Gates with Pauli Strings and Beyond
items.tldr: Any quantum computation consists of a sequence of unitary evolutions described by a finite set of Hamiltonians. (arXiv preprint)

items.tldr: Non-Hermitian systems can evade Anderson localization and exhibit delocalized states even in one dimension. (arXiv preprint)

items.tldr: We solve exactly the relativistic finite-difference equation for the quantum three-dimensional ring-shaped Quesne oscillator potential. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: A semi-definite programming formulation of the device-dependent guessing probability

items.title: A Geometric Family of Correlations Containing the Quantum Singlet

items.title: Shadow Engineering of Quantum Processes
items.tldr: Characterizing quantum processes is essential for hardware benchmarking, error diagnosis, and algorithm verification. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: Measurement-Free Toric-Code Memory in Array Globally Controlled Rydberg Array
items.tldr: The central prerequisite of any fault-tolerant quantum architecture is a quantum memory: a block of encoded physical qubits whose logical state is actively preserved against noise across many rounds of error correction. (arXiv preprint)
